signal_evidence.consumer_stress_tier: People buy less things in a bad market and they will buy more things on sale... in 2008-09, Great Recession, everybody in our category sales went down 35% to 40%—we promoted more and were able to stabilize to down 15%.
signal_evidence.capex_direction: We may consolidate to fewer vendors... I'd say just cut back on receipts until we have clarity... there might be some [new concept] delays... the investments get delayed and the complexity gets delayed.
signal_evidence.pricing_power: We dealt with tariffs out of China—you figure out how to be more efficient... there will be concessions on the manufacturing side, there'll be some concessions on our end.
signal_evidence.management_tone_shift: While we expect a higher risk business environment this year, due to the uncertainty caused by tariffs, market volatility, and inflation risk... the housing market actually got kind of worse for a period there... there's a good chance the housing market slows a little bit from here.
